description: Real Molmo YAM wrist jaw calibration landmarks for simulation visual alignment

unit_interpretation.arm_joints: radians (inferred from released values and YAM joint ranges; metadata does not declare units)
unit_interpretation.grippers: normalized [0,1] (empirically bounded in released data; metadata does not declare units)

coordinate_conventions.pixel_uv: [u,v] pixels from the top-left image corner; u right, v down
coordinate_conventions.point_link_m: [x,y,z] metres in the authored molmo_link6 fixed frame expected by the calibration fitter
coordinate_conventions.point_gripper_m: Audit copy of [x,y,z] metres in the generated YAM URDF gripper link frame
coordinate_conventions.tip_mapping: URDF tip_left is the image-left jaw; tip_right is the image-right jaw. This follows the released Molmo link6 mount: gripper +Y maps to camera -Y and therefore image right.
coordinate_conventions.gripper_mapping: q_m=-0.0475*g, where policy g=1 is open and g=0 is closed

annotation_method.two_d: Manual open-state anchors plus a fixed-camera prismatic interpolation of 147 px per unit g per jaw. The interpolation slope was measured between foldclo-01 episode 0 right-camera frames 0 and 192. All 48 generated wrist overlays were visually reviewed.
annotation_method.visibility: Both distal lateral corners are visible in every selected wrist frame; cloth overlap increases localization uncertainty but does not fully occlude the corner.
annotation_method.uncertainty: 5 px radius for near-home/left-camera annotations; 7 px for right-camera approach frames with motion or cloth overlap. These are calibration landmarks, not sub-pixel labels.
annotation_method.three_d: Raw STL vertices (trimesh process=False) are transformed by the URDF visual origin, prismatic joint q=-0.0475*g along its declared axis, and joint origin into the gripper link frame.
annotation_method.mesh_vertex_selection: At minimum mesh Z within 1e-6 m, choose the lateral Y inner/outer extreme; at maximum Z within 1e-6 m, choose the shaft lateral Y inner/outer extreme. Resolve equal-Y candidates by lexicographically minimum XYZ and record the first exact raw STL vertex index.
annotation_method.limitations: Dataset metadata does not declare joint units. Arm radians and normalized grippers are inferred from released values and YAM ranges. No camera calibration or 3D-to-2D reprojection is claimed by this artifact.

validation.camera_state_rule: left wrist: both tip_left and tip_right use state[6]; right wrist: both tip_left and tip_right use state[13]
